title: Material Experiment Game
genericDescription: Treat media, interface, model, archive, installation context, or hardware as material; discover affordances; document limitations.
specificDescription: Build a game using an unusual material constraint such as scanned documents, physical controllers, live performance, generated assets, speech input, public-domain media, model outputs, or found data.
gradingRubric: 30 pts material experiment; 20 pts integration with play; 20 pts technical/artistic control; 15 pts limitation documentation; 15 pts reflection.
